title: Chameleon
body:
# Chameleon

*Read in other languages: English, [한국어](https://github.com/LemonCaramel/Chameleon/blob/master/README.ko.md), [日本語](https://github.com/LemonCaramel/Chameleon/blob/master/README.ja.md).*

*Read the description of Fix MC-248936, the old name of this project: [English](https://github.com/LemonCaramel/Chameleon/blob/master/previous/README.md), [한국어](https://github.com/LemonCaramel/Chameleon/blob/master/previous/README.ko.md), [日本語](https://github.com/LemonCaramel/Chameleon/blob/master/previous/README.ja.md)*

--------

Introduction
--------
- This mod allows you to change the Dock icon in macOS on Minecraft 1.19 and later clients. (Starting from version 3.2.0, Windows OS is also unstable but supports it.)
- This mod provides icon pack containing 9 icons for players who run on macOS Big Sur or above.
  ![icon packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DNMzKpyW/images/a14c19e6e41f2c8dad4111f493fc4402e7269732.png)
- You can change Dock icon using the client command `/chameleon <icon name>` or through [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). You can also add the icon using a **Custom Resource Pack** if you want.
  ![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DNMzKpyW/images/0f443f6afdaba56e8f07c0b69ed150bf3c55a9fe.gif)


Caution!
--------
- [fabric-api](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) is required.
- This mod is only available on Java 17 or above.
